snippet.title: Terminator 7: Extinction (2027) - Arnold Schwarzenegger, Rami Malek | Concpet Trailer
snippet.description:
#Terminator7 #ArnoldSchwarzenegger #ramimalek 

Watch this Terminator 7: Extinction Concept Trailer and step into a dark What If future where the end begins without a single missile.

This fan-made What If concept imagines Charlize Theron as Sarah Connor, pulled out of isolation when Elle Fanning as Elena Reese arrives with a warning tied to Kyle Reese’s legacy.
Arnold Schwarzenegger returns as a damaged T 800 who chose long ago to stop killing, while Rami Malek appears as the terrifying TX OMEGA, a relentless new machine built by the consumer AI known as NEXUS.
I personally created the storyboard and visuals to explore how Terminator 7 could feel as a tense sci fi action thriller driven by survival, sacrifice, and the fear of technology turning against humanity.

From deadly smart-home attacks and Montana highway chases to forest pursuit, hidden machine cores, and a brutal final stand inside Cheyenne Mountain, this concept trailer is built for fans of Terminator, cyber warfare, and dystopian action.
The story pushes Sarah Connor, Elena Reese, and the T 800 into one last mission to stop NEXUS before civilization fully collapses under invisible AI control.
Watch till the end, subscribe for more concept trailers, and share whether you would want to see Terminator 7: Extinction become a real movie.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer. The storyboard and visuals were created by me, and this video is not affiliated with any official studio or production.

Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

snippet.title: THE ONE PIECE - Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
#THEONEPIECE #Annecy2026

Eiichiro Oda’s manga "ONE PIECE" (originally serialized in Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump in Japan) has become a cultural phenomenon with fans all around the globe, and now, it is being adapted as a new anime series, starting from the initial East Blue Saga. Produced by WIT Studio and giving viewers an opportunity to experience the adventures of Monkey D. Luffy and his Straw Hat Pirates by fully tapping into the expressive potential of modern technology to tell the story in a way that feels familiar yet fresh. Streaming only on Netflix, February 2027.


Official X: https://x.com/theop_official
Official Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theop_official/

snippet.title: 22 New GTA 6 Gameplay Details Revealed
snippet.description:
Just before GTA 6 preorders kick off, Rockstar Games has revealed the exclusive contents of the GTA 6 Ultimate Edition. Described as “an exclusive collection of premium vehicles, weapons, apparel, and action,” this GTA 6 special edition is not just a $100 splurge, but also our latest insight into how we’ll interact with this massive criminal open world. Read closely and between the lines, and you’ll find dozens of gameplay details here, revealing brand new activities like stolen goods fencing, fishing, and car restoration projects. And so we don’t have to wait until the November 19 GTA 6 release date to start to understand exactly what we’ll be up to on the streets of Vice City. Here are 22 new GTA 6 gameplay details right now.

#ign #gta6

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: PJ Harvey - Voyager (Official Video)
snippet.description:
‘Voyager’ by PJ Harvey, out now on Partisan Records: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/voyager

PJ Harvey returns with Voyager, a striking first signal from her next artistic chapter and first new music since 2023's Grammy-nominated I Inside the Old Year Dying. The song had already been taking shape as part of Harvey’s next album, when Professor Brian Cox invited her to write a song for his ‘Emergence' world tour. Recorded with a full orchestra at Miraval Studios in Provence, Voyager takes its name from the NASA probes launched in 1977, still travelling through interstellar space nearly 50 years on. The music highlights the interplay between swelling string arrangements and pulsing synthesiser signals stretching out into the cosmos: icy, ethereal, and pensive, yet threaded with an unmistakable humanity. Across it, Harvey contemplates our small, fragile place in the universe; a 'pale-blue dot', a flake of snow, dust in a sunbeam, and finds in that vastness a quiet plea to choose light and to choose love.

Directed by Professor Brian Cox & Nic Stacey
Edited by Nic Stacey
Photography by Chris Parks
Archive courtesy of NASA, JPL-Caltech, RetroHD and National Space Centre

Written by PJ Harvey
PJ Harvey: Prophet-5, vocals, percussion
Damien Quintard: Drum programming, mixing, production
Dario Marianelli: Orchestral arrangement and conductor
The Miraval Orchestra
Professor Brian Cox: Juno synth bass
George Cox: Percussive bass guitar
Recorded at Miraval Studios, Provence, February 2026

Join mailing list community: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/subscribeID
 
FOLLOW: 

Instagram: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveyIGID
Facebook: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveyFBID
Threads: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveyTHID
Bluesky: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveybskyID
X: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveyTWID
TikTok: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveyTTID
Spotify: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveySPID
Apple Music: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveyAPID
Youtube: https://pjharvey.lnk.to/PJHarveyYTID

PJ Harvey Official Website: https://PJHarvey.lnk.to/WebsiteID
PJ Harvey Official Store: https://PJHarvey.lnk.to/OfficialStoreID

Brian Cox Emergence world tour: https://briancoxlive.co.uk/ 
  
LYRICS:
 
long years, far place
dark nights, dark days
frozen, silent
bearing Earth-songs

force fields, high winds
cold moons, bright rings
hear my signal
will you follow?

look back at us
as a speck of dust
darkness our home
bear it through love

last note, last sign
Neptune, Triton
fading signal
choose light...choose love

Voyager, look back
at a pale-blue dot
all we don't know
a flake of snow

dust in a sunbeam, blue dot
so far, so cold
kindness, care for…
our shelter... tender

Grand Theft Auto VI is an upcoming action-adventure game developed and published by Rockstar Games. It is due to be the eighth main Grand Theft Auto game, following Grand Theft Auto V (2013), and the sixteenth entry overall. Set within the fictional US state of Leonida, based on Florida, the story follows the romantic criminal duo of Jason Duval and Lucia Caminos. Players will be able to freely roam Leonida's open world, which features the Miami-inspired Vice City.

Following years of speculation and anticipation, Rockstar confirmed in February 2022 that the game was in development. That September, footage from unfinished versions was leaked in what journalists described as one of the biggest leaks in the history of the video game industry. Grand Theft Auto VI was formally revealed in December 2023. Following multiple delays, it is scheduled to be released on 19 November 2026 for the PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S.
~ Wikipedia

It caught me by surprise

A love could be this true
And I didn’t know a dance could be this slow

Coz like all good things
It caught me by surprise

He’s my guy x2

You can’t have him
you can try try try

A rose on the vine
Oh I could just stare at him all the time time time

He’s my guy

(You can dream it all that you want but you can’t have my boy)

snippet.title: THE OUTER THREAT Official Trailer (2026) New Sci-Fi Thriller Movie | 4K
snippet.description:
The discovery of life beyond Earth turns a quiet rural life into a nightmare. Astrophysicists Daniel and Michelle raise their family in the countryside while studying the stars — until Daniel uncovers undeniable proof of alien life. Against Michelle's warning to keep it buried, he leaks it to the world. Almost immediately the family is under siege: the power and communications go dark, a swarm of drones closes in, and a relentless, faceless pursuer drives them from their home and across the countryside. With every mile the line between cosmic revelation and human paranoia blurs — and one question sharpens: is this a government cover-up, or the visitors themselves?
The Outer Threat marks the feature directorial debut of writer-director William Woods, starring Constance Wu, Mark O'Brien, and William Fichtner.

In Theaters (Canada): July 24, 2026

Digital & VOD (US): July 10, 2026

Distributed by Quiver Releasing / VVS Films

Enjoy advanced 4K Upscaling and HDR-10 mastering across future trailers. Stay tuned for more.

snippet.title: Loathe - Fangs (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Fangs by Loathe
Stream/Listen here: https://bfan.link/fangs
Taken from the new album 'A Stranger To You', out July 17th, 2026.

Pre-order 'A Stranger To You' here: https://bfan.link/a-stranger-to-you

Like a ghost
I fled the scene
Wishing I’d found it all so bleak
But I don’t
No stranger to the memories I keep 
 
I did my best
Way out of line
Such is my life
Maybe in time I’ll find I’m better off starting over
And if I could time it right I’d try again 
Weighed down by the state of it
I’m reminded how to savour it
Lately nothing matters much to me
“Can’t say I don’t mind”
 
But I’ve no time
For the way I’m living 
It keeps bringing me
To my knees I fall
I fall with every step I take
Maybe in time I’ll find I’m better off starting over
And if I could time it right I’d try again 
It seems like every day is the last one
Hours are killing me one by one
Only, I don’t mind
It’s my time

Written by: Erik Bickerstaffe, Feisal El-Khazragi, Kadeem France and Sean Radcliffe
Recorded at: The Shed and Real World Studios
Produced by: Erik Bickerstaffe and Sean Radcliffe
Engineered by: Erik Bickerstaffe, Sean Radcliffe and Adam Getgood
Assisted by: Ben Koch
Mixed by: Ed Al-Shakarchi and Erik Bickerstaffe
Mastered by: Ed Al-Shakarchi

Directed by Feisal El-Khazragi & Zak Pinchin
